target: One Next Step CTA Feature - Decision Engine, CTA Card, Focus Plan Page

summary.overall_result: Fixed critical bug in computeNextStepPlan() - was checking results.scores but results were stored directly as results.listening/results.reading. All 29 backend tests pass. CTA card and Focus Plan page now render correctly with all required data-testid attributes.

features_tested.feature: Backend: All 29 existing tests (16 mistake analysis + 13 speaking P2)
features_tested.details: All pytest tests pass: test_mistake_analysis.py (16 tests) + test_speaking_p2.py (13 tests)

features_tested.feature: Frontend: next-step-cta card on results page
features_tested.details: Card renders with title, subtitle, focus area badge, 15 min badge, and Start Focus Plan button
Fixed bug: was checking results.scores but data is stored as results.listening/results.reading directly. Now correctly picks lowest skill and most impactful action.
Clicking 'Start Focus Plan' navigates to /focus-plan with plan data in location.state
FocusPlan.js renders title like 'Reach Band 5 in Listening' with data-testid='focus-plan-title'
Why This Focus card renders with reason text and data points like '79x UNANSWERED', 'listening band: 4', 'Target: Band 5'
Your Plan (3 Steps) card renders numbered steps with titles, details, and duration
Start Practice button navigates to /cambridge-test/{bookId}/{testId} with retryWrongOnly state

features_tested.feature: Frontend: Previous features (reason codes, evidence, retry, speaking drills)
features_tested.details: All Phase 2 and Speaking P2 features still work - reason badges, evidence text, targeted retry buttons visible

critical_code_review_comments: BUG FIXED: computeNextStepPlan() was checking results?.scores but setResults() stores data directly as results.listening, results.reading, etc. Fixed by checking results?.listening && results?.reading instead.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all CTA and Focus Plan features working after bug fix)

seed_data_creation: None - uses existing ielts17/test1 test data
context_for_next_testing_agent: The One Next Step CTA feature is now working. BUG FIX applied: computeNextStepPlan() was incorrectly checking results.scores (undefined) instead of results.listening/results.reading. After fix, CTA card renders on results page after test evaluation. FocusPlan page at /focus-plan reads plan from location.state. The decision engine prioritizes: (1) speaking filler>3/min → fluency drill, (2) TFNG confusion >=3 → TFNG retry, (3) largest reason code cluster → targeted retry, (4) default → lowest skill improvement.

bug_fix_details.issue: Function checked 'results?.scores' but setResults() stores data directly as results.listening, results.reading, etc. - not under results.scores
bug_fix_details.fix: Changed check from 'results?.scores' to 'results?.listening && results?.reading', removed 'const scores = results.scores;' and updated references to use 'results.listening?.band' and 'results.reading?.band' directly
